title: FDE Guizang-Hybrid Full Film
rules: Show title and author identity on frame zero.
Use a small registered set of layouts; do not synthesize free-form dashboard geometry.
Keep chapter titles on a full reading axis before splitting a scene into columns.
Let nodes settle before lines or loops reveal.
Do not crossfade dense layouts; cut through a stable paper or ink field.
Reserve the lower safe area for captions.

assets.provenance: Existing FDE visual asset; conceptual illustration only
